properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All that I have, I'll sell all that I have To hold in my hand the pearl Nothing I have, can compare with the prize When I hold in my hand the pearl

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Brighter than sun! Clearer than glass! Dearer than gold, the pearl! Kingdom of God, is the kingdom of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Is life, with my lord, the pearl! All that I have, is ashes, is earth Now that I've seen the pearl! I will not rest, I cannot be content

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Til' at last, it is mine Forever to shine The kingdom of God… the pearl! Let me gather every thing I own

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All that in this dreary world, I've known Pleasures and possessions, now, I bring Trade them for one, single shining thing All that I have, is ashes, is earth

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now that I've seen the pearl! I will not rest, I cannot be content Til' at last, it is mine, Forever to shine The kingdom of God, the pearl!
